Security

Proactive cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance for modern organizations

Blue Team cybersecurity operations, NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, threat hunting, and incident response. Protect your organization with chen.ist.

Proactive Security

Monitor threats. Respond to incidents. Stay compliant. All managed for you.

Security, simplified

Four services that work together to protect your business.

SOC Monitoring

24/7 surveillance and real-time threat detection across your environment.

Threat Hunting

Proactive search for hidden threats that evade automated detection.

NIS2 Compliance

Gap analysis, risk frameworks, and compliance roadmaps for the EU directive.

CISO as a Service

Strategic security leadership and board reporting without a full-time hire.

Always watching.
Always ready.

Our SOC operates around the clock with open-source tools you can audit. We detect, investigate, and respond — so you can focus on your business.

Talk to our team

NIS2 compliance.
From gap to green.

The directive is enforceable now. We take you from scoping and gap analysis through full compliance — with board-ready documentation at every step.

Check your NIS2 status

When the worst happens.
You'll be ready.

We build, test, and maintain your incident response plan. Every phase documented. Every role defined. NIS2's 24-hour reporting window — covered.

Build your IR plan

<24h

free assessment

30 minutes. No sales pitch. Just an honest look at your security posture.
